questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "listening"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "reading"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "grammar"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "score"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "section"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "tense"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "structure"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "mistake"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "correct"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "incorrect"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "strategy"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "time limit"?
questions.explanation: "time limit" có nghĩa là "giới hạn thời gian".

questions.question: Choose the best word: Revise every verb _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Revise every verb tense." — từ đúng là "tense" (thì).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Learn each sentence _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Learn each sentence structure." — từ đúng là "structure" (cấu trúc).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Avoid common _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Avoid common mistakes." — từ đúng là "mistake" (lỗi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Choose the _____ answer.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Choose the correct answer." — từ đúng là "correct" (đúng/sửa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This answer is _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This answer is incorrect." — từ đúng là "incorrect" (sai).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Use a good exam _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Use a good exam strategy." — từ đúng là "strategy" (chiến lược).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Watch the _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Watch the time limit." — từ đúng là "time limit" (giới hạn thời gian).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Be _____ in the exam.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Be confident in the exam." — từ đúng là "confident" (tự tin).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ your notes tonight.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Revise your notes tonight." — từ đúng là "revise" (ôn lại).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The exam _____es four skills.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The exam assesses four skills." — từ đúng là "assess" (đánh giá).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ matters in writing.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Accuracy matters in writing." — từ đúng là "accuracy" (độ chính xác).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Speak with _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Speak with fluency." — từ đúng là "fluency" (sự trôi chảy).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She said she ___ studied all night.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: present perfect → past perfect.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If it ___, we will cancel the trip.
questions.explanation: First conditional uses present simple in the if-clause.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The house ___ built last year.
Complete the sentence: I have ___ finished the test.
questions.explanation: 'Just' with present perfect for recent action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: This is the ___ exam of the year.
Complete the sentence: You ___ revise before the exam.
Complete the sentence: While I ___, the bell rang.
questions.explanation: Past continuous for an interrupted action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The man ___ marked the test is strict.
Complete the sentence: I think I ___ pass the exam.
Complete the sentence: English ___ spoken in many countries.
questions.explanation: Passive present simple singular: is + participle.

questions.question: Which English word means "nghe"?
Which English word means "đọc"?
Which English word means "ngữ pháp"?
Which English word means "điểm số"?
Which English word means "phần"?
Which English word means "thì"?
